headingDesc: Give your accountant, ops manager, or buyer their own view — filtered to what they need. Click a role to see detailed permissions.
emptyMembers: No team members yet. Invite your accountant, ops manager, or co-founder.
roleOwnerWho: The business owner or founder. One per organisation.
roleOwnerUseCase0: Manages billing, team, and all settings
roleOwnerUseCase1: Full control over data connections and integrations
roleOwnerUseCase2: Can delete data, remove members, and cancel plans
roleAdminWho: A trusted co-founder, operations manager, or senior partner.
roleAdminCannotAccess0: Cannot change billing or cancel subscription
roleAdminUseCase2: Full operational access to all intelligence tools
roleAnalystWho: A data-savvy team member who runs reports and analyses trends.
roleAnalystCannotAccess0: Cannot invite or remove team members
roleAnalystCannotAccess2: Cannot connect or disconnect data sources
roleAnalystCannotAccess3: Cannot modify POS inventory or settings
roleAnalystUseCase0: Runs AI-powered analyses and saves reports
roleAnalystUseCase2: Creates forecasts and expansion opportunity research
roleAccountantDesc: Financial data and CFO reports only
roleAccountantWho: Your external accountant, bookkeeper, or financial advisor.
roleAccountantCannotAccess0: Cannot access non-financial dashboards or tools
roleAccountantCannotAccess1: Cannot see POS transactions or inventory
roleAccountantCannotAccess2: Cannot manage team, billing, data sources, or settings
roleAccountantCannotAccess3: Cannot access supplier or expansion tools
roleAccountantUseCase0: Reviews P&L summaries and cash runway reports
roleAccountantUseCase1: Runs CFO Mode reports for board preparation
roleAccountantUseCase2: Asks financial questions about revenue, margins, and cash flow
roleBuyerWho: A purchasing manager, procurement lead, or stock controller.
roleBuyerCannotAccess0: Cannot access financial reports or CFO Mode
roleBuyerCannotAccess1: Cannot manage team, billing, or settings
roleBuyerCannotAccess2: Cannot connect or disconnect data sources
roleBuyerCannotAccess3: Cannot view revenue or margin data
roleBuyerUseCase0: Manages inventory levels, reorder points, and stock alerts
roleBuyerUseCase1: Uses Supplier Scorecard and Landed Cost tools
roleBuyerUseCase2: Runs AI questions about stock, suppliers, and purchasing
roleViewerWho: An investor, advisor, or board member who needs visibility without editing.
roleViewerCannotAccess0: Cannot create, edit, or delete anything
roleViewerCannotAccess1: Cannot ask AI questions (view saved answers only)
roleViewerCannotAccess2: Cannot access settings, billing, team, or data sources
roleViewerUseCase1: Monitors Business Pulse score and KPIs
